mechanism: R-star uncertainty determines whether current equity multiples are fairly priced or 15-20% overvalued. If r-star settles at the higher end of the HLW confidence interval, the Nifty Fifty discount rate shock precedent activates as multiple compression becomes necessary.
regime_dependence: Activates if r-star resolves above 1.5% and inflation regime shifts durably above 2.5%. Dormant if AI productivity keeps r-star low.
